name: Plasma
description: Plasma family — eight pattern variants (Classic, Rings, Diamond, Warp, Cells, Noise, Fractal, Lattice) on node.wgsl_compute, the JSON-editable shader escape hatch. Per Peter (2026-05-29): the variants are simple per-pixel sin-sum shaders but would be an absurd graph as raw math atoms, so they live in one editable WGSL string selected by a `switch (pattern)` — the right tool for a simple shader / complex graph. Replaces the compiled-in node.plasma_pattern_2d primitive: same algorithms and constants, now user-editable (append a case to the switch + a pattern_2d function to add a variant). time/aspect wire from generator_input; scale is inverted in-shader (zoom). clip_trigger uses node.clip_trigger_cycle (uniqueness invariant) + node.mux_scalar to swap between the manual `pattern` slider and trigger-driven cycling, matching the Strange Attractor pattern.

nodes.title: Plasma Pattern
